text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 
42 
MDCD_OT_MC_CAPTD_USE 
LABEL: 
Medicaid Managed Care Capitated Claim Count — Other Services 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total count of the Other Services (OT) claims for capitated payments for the 
beneficiary during the year. 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Other Services Claims file (derived) 
VALUES: 
XX 
COMMENT: 
These are header claims where the claim type code (T-MSIS variable called CLM_TYPE_CD) is
